content.content:
=== app/src/main/java/com/example/combined_schedule/ui/screens/AddEditEntryScreen.kt ===
package com.example.combined_schedule.ui.screens

import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*
import androidx.compose.material3.*
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp

@Composable
fun AddEditEntryScreen() {
    Column(
        modifier = Modifier
            .fillMaxSize()
            .padding(16.dp),
        horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
        verticalArrangement = Arrangement.Center
    ) {
        Text(
            text = "Add / Edit Entry",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium
        )
        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
        Text(
            text = "Form to create or modify an entry",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
        )
    }
}

input.command: cd "/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project" && cat app/build.gradle.kts && cat gradle/libs.versions.toml
input.description: Read build config and version catalog

content.text:
Looking at the code, I found two issues:

**1. Missing `material-icons-extended` dependency (build error)**

`Icons.Default.NotificationsOff` and `Icons.Default.DateRange` are not in the core icons set — they require `material-icons-extended`, which is not in your dependencies. This will cause a compilation failure.

**2. Nested `Scaffold` (UI issue)**

`HomeScreen` creates its own `Scaffold` (for the FAB) inside the outer `Scaffold` in `AppNavigation`. This can cause incorrect inset/padding handling. The FAB should be hoisted to the outer `Scaffold` instead, but for now the simpler fix is to just place the FAB directly without a nested `Scaffold`.

---

Let me fix both:
**Fix 1:** Add `material-icons-extended` to the version catalog and build file.

input.new_string:
androidx-compose-material3 = { group = "androidx.compose.material3", name = "material3" }
androidx-compose-material-icons-extended = { group = "androidx.compose.material", name = "material-icons-extended" }

package com.example.combined_schedule.ui.screens

import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*
import androidx.compose.foundation.lazy.LazyColumn

import java.time.LocalTime

content.text:
Two issues fixed and pushed:

| Issue | Severity | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `Icons.Default.NotificationsOff` / `DateRange` not found | **Build error** | Added `material-icons-extended` dependency |
| `HomeScreen` had its own `Scaffold` inside `AppNavigation`'s `Scaffold` | **UI bug** | Replaced with `Box` + FAB using `Alignment.BottomEnd` |
